---
title: "tabsets.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/docs/site_libs/quarto-html/tabsets/tabsets.js"
loc: 85
complexity: 7
logic_score: 2.60
style_score: 4.05
intel_score: 2.94
overall_score: 3.45
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `init`
- `init`
- `getTabSettings`
- `data`
- `setTabSettings`
- `setTabState`
- `data`
- `toggleTab`
- `tabPanelId`
- `tabPanel`
- `toggleAll`
- `active`
- `findSelectorsToSyncByLanguage`
- `result`
- `tabs`
- `div`
- `group`
- `selectorsToSync`
- `value`
- `setupSelectorSync`
- `selectorsToSync`
- `selectorsToSync`
- `selectors`
